title: Real-Time MIDI Call-and-Response Generation Using Autoregressive Transformers
description: Code and supporting summary outputs for a real-time MIDI call-and-response system based on offline autoregressive Transformers, with MIDI-VAD phrase segmentation, asynchronous scheduling, speculative preload, phrase-level musical control, Call100 objective evaluation, A0-A6 ablation summaries, and latency logging summaries.
notes: This archive excludes model weights, Hugging Face caches, piano sample libraries, VST plugins, DAWs, generated MIDI responses, private study answer keys, and raw per-run output directories.
